item.title: Nigeria Records 65,759 Suspected Diphtheria Cases, 2,229 Deaths
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria has recorded 65,759 suspected cases of diphtheria and 2,229 deaths since the outbreak began in 2022, highlighting the persistent threat posed by the vaccine-preventable disease despite progress in containing its spread. The latest figures, released by the Nigeria Centre for Disease Control a

item.description: Two bombs exploded near a luxury hotel in Damascus on Tuesday, injuring 18 people and casting a shadow over French President Emmanuel Macron’s historic visit to Syria—the first by a European Union head of state since the fall of former President Bashar al-Assad. item.title: Egypt Exit the FIFA World Cup With Heads Held High After Argentina Thriller
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: Egypt exited the 2026 FIFA World Cup after a 3-2 Round of 16 loss to Argentina. item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil surged as the US military said it was carrying out new strikes against Iran. Stocks in Asia were poised to drop for a second day as a selloff in chipmakers rippled across markets.

item.title: Of course viewers are giving up on Netflix shows
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Even though Netflix is the world's most popular paid streaming service, the company has been struggling to keep viewers watching its series after their first seasons. Beef - the streamer's anthology about people locked in feuds - lost 70 percent of its viewership when it returned earlier this year.

item.title: Notorious terrorist commander killed as troops intensify offensive in Katsina, Zamfara​
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Troops of the Joint Task Force North West, Operation FANSAN YAMMA, have neutralised a notorious terrorist commander, foiled coordinated attacks and recovered weapons during separate military operations in Zamfara and Katsina states. The development was disclosed in a statement issued by the Media In

item.title: 2026 World Cup: The match was rigged for Argentina – Egypt coach, Hassan
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Egypt head coach. Hossam Hassan, has claimed their last-16 match at the 2026 World Cup was rigged in favour of Argentina. The Pharoahs threw away a two-goal lead to lose 3-2 on Tuesday evening. But some of the officiating calls left Hassan angry after the game. “I will say what’s on my m

item.title: Edo gives businesses ultimatum to install CCTV
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Edo has directed businesses to install CCTV cameras by 30 July to strengthen crime-fighting efforts, but the order has raised questions about its legal basis, affordability, and privacy, drawing contrasting reactions from government and civil society. The post Edo gives businesses ultimatum to insta

item.title: Governors Back Tinubu, Urge Nigerians To Stay Course
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: First-term governors elected on the platform of the All Progressives Congress have reaffirmed their support for President Bola Ahmed Tinubu's Renewed Hope Agenda, urging Nigerians to remain patient as the administration's economic reforms take effect. The post Governors Back Tinubu, Urge Nigerians T

item.title: Operations Platform SnowCloud Wants to Run Resorts By iPhone
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Joe Hession, CEO and co-founder of SnowCloud, and Doug Pierini, CEO of Jackson Hole Mountain Resort, discussed efforts to move customer relations including sales and guest information on one platform. Pierini, whose resort uses SnowCloud, said that it has enhanced guest experiences now that guests e

item.title: Police apprehend suspected impersonator, recover security uniforms in A’Ibom
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The police spokesperson added that the search resulted in the recovery of several items, including police berets, police buttons and insignia, inspector rank badges, and PMF uniforms. The post Police apprehend suspected impersonator, recover security uniforms in A’Ibom appeared first on Vanguard New

item.title: Viral AI fakes flood social media as Iran mourns Khamenei
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Iran drew huge crowds for former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral procession in Tehran, documented by international news agencies. But alongside genuine images pf mourners, AI-generated videos and photos falsely claiming to show the event have spread widely online. Some exaggerate cro

item.title: Egypt boss slams 'unfair' officiating and claims World Cup 'directed towards Argentina'
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Egypt head coach Hossam Hassan said the referee was "unfair" and claimed the World Cup was "directed towards Argentina" following their dramatic 3-2 defeat in the last 16.
